prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `4df5b0ae`.
codex_response:
Rule: treat `7` as background, ignore any connected non-`7` object whose bounding box spans the full grid, sort the remaining connected objects by increasing size, normalize them, and repack them left-to-right along the bottom of a fresh `7` grid.

I used the Opus hint and discarded the Sonnet hint. The Sonnet summary described column-wise gravity, which contradicts the official examples; that mismatch is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_4df5b0ae/notes.md). The generator stays on-family by sampling 10x10 orange-background scenes with 3-4 disconnected single-color motifs, optional full-edge frames, simple line/rectangle/L/P-style connected shapes, occasional repeated colors, and scattered placements before constructively packing the latent objects. No new reusable primitive was needed.

Checks passed: official verifier `4/4`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, and I visually inspected [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/4df5b0ae/previews/preview_01.png).
